name: John Mengucci
background: Mr. Mengucci has served as President and Chief Executive Officer of CACI since July 2019. He previously served as Chief Operating Officer from 2012 to 2019. Before joining CACI, he held leadership positions at Lockheed Martin Corporation.

company_affiliations.name: Lockheed Martin Corporation
company_affiliations.title_or_role: President, Information Systems and Global Solutions (Civil and Defense segments)
